persona: People Ops director, anonymous engagement study, 800 employees
prompt_to_designer: Broadcast email to all-staff. Voice or text — respondent chooses. Report must have zero PII in quotes; the anonymization guarantee has to be verifiable in the event log so Legal can sign off.

sample_answers.text: 6. The recent RIF changed the vibe.
Endless meetings from leadership that could have been a Loom.
My manager blocks Fridays as no-meeting deep-work days. Team output went up.
The 3-day RTO policy. Two days would land differently.

expected_themes: engagement dip post-RIF is real and measurable
meeting overload from leadership is the top energy drain
'no-meeting Fridays' clones as a template management behavior
3-day RTO is the most-cited policy irritant
anonymization audit trail must survive Legal review
